name: Kuehne+Nagel Digital Logistics REST API
what_it_does: Kuehne+Nagel digital logistics REST API for shippers, importers, exporters, and supply chain teams to access ocean freight booking, air freight quoting, customs management, shipment tracking, and supply chain visibility across global trade lanes — enabling automated freight booking, shipment status monitoring, document management, and supply chain analytics through Kuehne+Nagel's digital logistics platform (myKN and KN FreightNet). Enables AI agents to manage ocean freight booking for FCL and LCL shipping automation, handle air freight quoting for airfreight rate and booking automation, access shipment tracking for global freight status and milestone automation, retrieve customs documentation for import/export declaration support automation, manage purchase order visibility for PO-level supply chain tracking automation, handle carbon reporting for freight emissions calculation automation, access invoice management for freight bill and customs duties automation, retrieve analytics for supply chain performance and spend reporting automation, manage temperature monitoring for cold chain visibility automation, and integrate Kuehne+Nagel with ERP, TMS, and supply chain platforms for global logistics automation.
use_cases: Booking ocean freight containers and tracking shipment status for import/export automation agents
Getting instant air freight quotes and booking for time-sensitive cargo automation agents
Monitoring global supply chain visibility at PO level for procurement automation agents
Managing customs documentation and clearance for trade compliance automation agents
not_for: Domestic US trucking (Kuehne+Nagel is international freight forwarding, not domestic FTL/LTL broker)
Last-mile delivery (Kuehne+Nagel is international forwarding, not last-mile courier or delivery)
Consumer package shipping (Kuehne+Nagel is B2B commercial freight, not consumer parcel shipping)
best_when: A shipper, importer, exporter, or supply chain team wanting AI agents to automate international ocean and air freight bookings, track global shipments, manage customs documentation, and gain supply chain visibility through Kuehne+Nagel's digital logistics platform.
avoid_when: COMMERCIAL RELATIONSHIP REQUIRED: KN digital API requires active Kuehne+Nagel customer account; automated developer-access assumption creates account_required; automated must be KN commercial customer. RATE QUOTES ARE MARKET-DRIVEN: Ocean and air freight rates fluctuate with market conditions; automated fixed-rate assumption creates rate_change_surprise for dynamic spot market rates; automated must re-quote before booking. CUSTOMS COMPLIANCE IS SHIPPER RESPONSIBILITY: While KN provides customs support, trade compliance is ultimately shipper's responsibility; automated fully-managed assumption creates liability_gap for compliance decisions; automated must involve licensed customs broker for regulated trade. DOCUMENTATION REQUIREMENTS VARY BY TRADE LANE: Import/export documentation requirements differ by country pair; automated uniform-documentation assumption creates missing_document for country-specific requirements; automated must verify documentation requirements per trade lane.

auth.notes: Kuehne+Nagel uses OAuth2 + API key for digital logistics REST API. REST API with JSON. Schindellegi, Switzerland HQ. Founded 1890. Products: myKN (customer portal), KN FreightNet (online quoting), KN BestMatch (AI routing), KN PlatformX (visibility). CHF 28B revenue (2022). One of the world's largest logistics companies. Competes with DHL, Panalpina (now part of DSV), and Flexport for international freight forwarding.

pricing.free_tier_limits: myKN portal free for KN customers; API access requires commercial agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Freight charges per shipment at market rates; API integration included with commercial relationship
pricing.notes: Schindellegi CH. CHF 28B revenue. Per-shipment freight charges. One of world's largest logistics companies.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; quoting and booking APIs throttled per commercial account

known_agent_gotchas: RATE VALIDITY IS SHORT FOR OCEAN SPOT: Ocean spot rates are valid for limited time (days to weeks); automated long-validity assumption creates expired_rate for rates not booked within validity window; automated must book within rate validity period

BOOKING CONFIRMATION IS NOT IMMEDIATE: Ocean freight booking goes through carrier confirmation process; automated instant-confirmation assumption creates pending_booking for loads awaiting carrier space confirmation; automated must poll booking status

TRACKING GRANULARITY VARIES BY MODE: Ocean tracking events are less frequent than air; automated real-time assumption creates sparse_events for ocean shipments with infrequent port-to-port milestones; automated must calibrate tracking polling to mode-appropriate frequency

TRADE LANE DOCUMENTATION VARIES: Import/export requirements differ dramatically by country pair; automated uniform-docs assumption creates customs_hold for trade lanes with specific documentation requirements; automated must consult KN trade lane requirements

CONTAINER AVAILABILITY IS SEASONAL: Container and space availability varies by trade lane and season; automated year-round capacity assumption creates space_not_available for peak season bookings; automated must book ahead for peak seasons
agent_readiness.security_notes: International logistics. GDPR, SOC2, AEO. OAuth2. EU/Global. Freight booking and trade documentation data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Freight forwarding. GDPR, AEO. OAuth2. EU/Global. International shipment and trade data.
